languages.text: Синдикат, снабжавший Футфол некоторыми глубоко незаконными грузами, погиб вместо со своим кораблем в варп-шторме. Наместник Владайм ищет нового поставщика, который удовлетворит жажду обитающих под его рукой любителей дурмана.

traits.locale_text: Синдикат "Орсино", снабжавший Футфол некоторыми глубоко незаконными грузами, погиб вместо со своим кораблем в варп-шторме. Наместник Владайм ищет нового поставщика, который удовлетворит жажду обитающих под его рукой любителей дурмана.

Синдикат, снабжавший Футфол некоторыми глубоко незаконными грузами, погиб вместо со своим кораблем в варп-шторме. Наместник Владайм ищет нового поставщика, который удовлетворит жажду обитающих под его рукой любителей дурмана.

languages.text: The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.
languages.original_text: Синдикат, снабжавший Футфол некоторыми глубоко незаконными грузами, погиб вместо со своим кораблем в варп-шторме. Наместник Владайм ищет нового поставщика, который удовлетворит жажду обитающих под его рукой любителей дурмана.

traits.locale_text: Members of the syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal items perished in the Warp with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfill the station's demand for the narcotics.

Members of the syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal items perished in the Warp with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfill the station's demand for the narcotics.

The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

languages.text: Das Syndikat, das Footfall mit hochgradig illegaler Schmuggelware belieferte, ist in einem Warpsturm mitsamt seinem Schiff und seiner Fracht untergegangen. Vladaym Tokara ist auf der Suche nach einem neuen Lieferanten, um den Bedarf der "stimulierten" Bewohner seiner Station zu decken.
languages.original_text: The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

traits.locale_text: Das Syndikat, das Footfall mit hochgradig illegaler Schmuggelware belieferte, ist in einem Warpsturm mitsamt seinem Schiff und seiner Fracht untergegangen. Vladaym Tokara ist auf der Suche nach einem neuen Lieferanten, um den Bedarf der "stimulierten" Bewohner seiner Station zu decken.

languages.text: Le syndicat qui approvisionnait Footfall en produits de contrebande hautement illégaux a péri dans une tempête de distorsion avec son vaisseau et sa cargaison. Vladaym Tokara est à la recherche d'un nouveau fournisseur pour répondre aux besoins des habitants les plus "stimulés" de sa station.
languages.original_text: The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

traits.locale_text: Le syndicat qui approvisionnait Footfall en produits de contrebande hautement illégaux a péri dans une tempête de distorsion avec son vaisseau et sa cargaison. Vladaym Tokara est à la recherche d'un nouveau fournisseur pour répondre aux besoins des habitants les plus "stimulés" de sa station.

languages.text: El sindicato que abastecía a Footfall de contrabando altamente ilegal ha perecido en una tormenta warp junto con su nave y su cargamento. Vladaym Tokara busca un nuevo proveedor para satisfacer las necesidades de los habitantes más "estimulados" de su estación.
languages.original_text: The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

traits.locale_text: El sindicato que abastecía a Footfall de contrabando altamente ilegal ha perecido en una tormenta warp junto con su nave y su cargamento. Vladaym Tokara busca un nuevo proveedor para satisfacer las necesidades de los habitantes más "estimulados" de su estación.

languages.text: Footfall'a yüksek oranda yasadışı kaçak mal tedarik eden sendika, gemileri ve kargolarıyla birlikte bir warp fırtınasında yok olmuştur. Vladaym Tokara, istasyonunun daha "uyarılmış" sakinlerinin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için yeni bir tedarikçi arıyor.
languages.original_text: The syndicate that supplied Footfall with highly illegal contraband have perished in a warp storm along with their ship and cargo. Vladaym Tokara is looking for a new supplier to fulfil the needs of his station's more "stimulated" denizens.

traits.locale_text: Footfall'a yüksek oranda yasadışı kaçak mal tedarik eden sendika, gemileri ve kargolarıyla birlikte bir warp fırtınasında yok olmuştur. Vladaym Tokara, istasyonunun daha "uyarılmış" sakinlerinin ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak için yeni bir tedarikçi arıyor.
